title: Ordering Politely
learningGoal: Speak clearly to make polite requests in a restaurant setting using 'I would like' and 'Could you'.
instructions: レストランで注文をします。「I want」や「Can you」の代わりに、丁寧な表現を使いましょう。マイクに向かって、「ステーキをお願いします。水を持ってきていただけますか？」と英語で話してください。(Order food at a restaurant using polite expressions. Speak into the microphone and say: 'I would like the steak, please. Could you bring me some water?')
speakingPrompt: Say: 'I would like the steak, please. Could you bring me some water?'
scenario: You are at a nice restaurant and the waiter asks for your order.

subTasks.prompt: Order the steak politely. (I would like the steak, please.)

sampleResponse.targetText: I would like the steak, please.
sampleResponse.transliteration: アイ ウッド ライク ザ ステーキ、プリーズ。
sampleResponse.baseTranslation: ステーキをお願いします。

subTasks.prompt: Ask the waiter to bring water politely. (Could you bring me some water?)

sampleResponse.targetText: Could you bring me some water?
sampleResponse.transliteration: クジュー ブリング ミー サム ウォーター？
sampleResponse.baseTranslation: 水を持ってきていただけますか？

scenarioContext.targetText: Good evening. May I take your order?
scenarioContext.transliteration: グッド イヴニング。メイ アイ テイク ユア オーダー？
scenarioContext.baseTranslation: こんばんは。ご注文をお伺いしてもよろしいでしょうか？

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: I would like the steak, please.
baselineTranscriptSentences.transliteration: アイ ウッド ライク ザ ステーキ、プリーズ。
baselineTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: ステーキをお願いします。

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: Could you bring me some water?
baselineTranscriptSentences.transliteration: クジュー ブリング ミー サム ウォーター？
baselineTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: 水を持ってきていただけますか？

acceptableParaphrases: I'd like the steak, please. Could you bring me some water?

criteria.name: Polite Modals
criteria.description: Must use 'would like' and 'could you' (no 'want' or 'can you').

criteria.name: Pronunciation
criteria.description: Clear pronunciation of 'Could you' (linking sounds ok) and 'steak'.

criteria.name: Content
criteria.description: Both the food order and the water request are stated.

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: I would like the steak, please. Could you bring me some water?

feedbackRules.onPass: Beautiful! You sounded very polite and natural, exactly like a customer at a nice restaurant.
feedbackRules.onFail: Please try again. Remember to say 'I would like' instead of 'I want', and 'Could you' instead of 'Can you'.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good effort! Try linking 'Could' and 'you' together so it sounds like 'Cuh-joo'.

audioAssets.audioTranscript: I would like the steak, please. Could you bring me some water?

hintText: Don't use 'want' or 'can'. Be as polite as possible!
